message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam lifelineStrategy solid
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam noteStyle handwritten
skinparam actorStyle awesome

actor "Organization Employee" as Employee
participant ":CreateTaskUI" as UI
participant ":CreateTaskController" as Controller
participant "ApplicationPOT" as AppPOT
participant "app\n:ApplicationPOT" as App
participant "session\n:UserSession" as Session
participant ":Platform" as Platform
participant "org\n:Organization" as Org
participant "cat\n:Category" as Cat
participant "lc\n:List<Category>" as LC
participant "task\n:Task" as Task

Employee -> UI: 1 asks to create a new task
activate UI
UI -> Employee: 2 requests data (reference, designation, informal description, technical description, duration, cost)
Employee -> UI: 3 types requested data
UI -> Controller: 4 lc=getTaskCategories()
activate Controller
Controller -> Org: 5 lc=getTaskCategories()
activate Org
Org --> Controller: 
deactivate Org
Controller --> UI: 
deactivate Controller
UI -> Employee: 6 shows task categories list and ask to select one
Employee -> UI: 7 selects a task category
UI -> Controller: 8 createTask(ref,designation,informalDesc,technicalDesc,duration,cost,categoryId)
activate Controller
Controller -> Org: 9 cat=getCategoryById(categoryId)
activate Org
Org --> Controller: 
deactivate Org
Controller -> App: 10 app = getInstance()
activate App
App --> Controller: 
deactivate App
Controller -> Session: 11 session = getCurrentSession()
activate Session
Session --> Controller: 
deactivate Session
Controller -> Session: 12 email = getUserEmail()
activate Session
Session --> Controller: 
deactivate Session
Controller -> Org: 13 org = getOrganizationByUserEmail(email)
activate Org
Org --> Controller: 
deactivate Org
Controller -> Org: 14 task=createTask(ref,designation,informalDesc,technicalDesc,duration,cost,cat)
activate Org
Org -> Task: 15 create(ref,designation,informalDesc,technicalDesc,duration,cost,cat)
activate Task
Task --> Org: 
deactivate Task
Org -> Org: 16 validateTask(task)
Org --> Controller: 
deactivate Org
Controller --> UI: 17 result
deactivate Controller
UI -> Employee: 18 shows all data and requests confirmation
Employee -> UI: 19 confirms the data
UI -> Controller: 20 saveTask()
activate Controller
Controller -> Org: 21 saveTask(task)
activate Org
Org -> Org: 22 validateTask(task)
Org -> Org: 23 addTask(task)
Org --> Controller: 
deactivate Org
Controller --> UI: 24 result
deactivate Controller
UI -> Employee: 25 informs operation success
deactivate UI
@enduml
```
